title: adenophyllum aurantium
intro: Adenophyllum aurantium, also known as the orange bush or golden bush, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been attributed to its high concentration of essential oils. The health benefits of Adenophyllum aurantium include treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from pain and fever. Adenophyllum aurantium can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used in folk medicine and traditional healing practices.
